import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { cursorTo } from "readline"; export default function Tile() { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem("authToken"); if (token) { setIsLoggedIn(true); } }, []); const handleTitleClick = () => { if (isLoggedIn) { navigate("/Main"); } else { navigate("/Login"); } }; return (
